option_line: rao_askDiktatMerc4c:"Looks like someone is losing their bonus. Anyway, I want in."
original: Looks like someone is losing their bonus. Anyway, I want in.

option_line: rao_askDiktatMerc4d:"Clearly you don't take this very seriously."
original: Clearly you don't take this very seriously.

"Really?" Admiral Rao, leaning forward, puts on a look of concern.

He speaks officiously. "As a patriotic citizen, I'm sure you'll have reported all such lapses of policy so that official action may be taken."

The pose holds for a moment, then half a smile cracks through.
He shrugs, holding his ironic half-smile in place. Behind it his eyes are cold, very cold.

option_line: rao_askDiktatMerc4b:"If it's a fight against the Diktat, I want to be a part of it."
original: If it's a fight against the Diktat, I want to be a part of it.

option_line: rao_askDiktatMerc4c:"Looks like someone is losing their bonus. Anyway, I want in."
original: Looks like someone is losing their bonus. Anyway, I want in.

"Then I bid you a good day, captain."

Rao flicks the comms cut-off.

"Hmm." Rao looks you over. Is that a twinkle of amusement?

"Why?"

He leaves the silence for you to fill.

option_line: rao_askDiktatMerc5merc:"Because you'll pay me well, and on time. You were a freelancer, you know the life."
original: Because you'll pay me well, and on time. You were a freelancer, you know the life.

option_line: rao_askDiktatMerc5faith:"They're systematically killing the Faithful, they closed the Shrine of Volturn. My duty is to resist."
original: They're systematically killing the Faithful, they closed the Shrine of Volturn. My duty is to resist.
